answer:
Adobe Commerce does not offer a free tier [1]. However, there is a free, self-hosted version called Magento Open Source [1][2]. While Magento Open Source is free to download and use, it does not include cloud hosting, 24/7 support, or native B2B features, and it typically has limitations regarding advanced API access compared to paid Adobe Commerce plans [1][2][3].

For technical access, Adobe Commerce provides a GraphQL API [4]. You can explore the API using the Commerce API playground, which allows you to run queries against a live instance with sample data [4]. Your GraphQL endpoint is determined by your project type [4]:

For PaaS: `https://<your-domain>/graphql`
For SaaS: `https://<your-instance-id>.api.commerce.adobe.com/<environment-id>/graphql`

API usage for specific enterprise features or higher limits is generally restricted to paid Adobe Commerce licenses [1][3].
